title: Paramollugo deltoidea
taxonomy: Paramollugo deltoidea is a species of plant in the family Molluginaceae. It is a member of the order Caryophyllales and the subclass Rosidae. The genus Paramollugo belongs to the family Molluginaceae and is a part of the angiosperm group of plants. This species is a succulent herb and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Paramollugo deltoidea is a part of the broader plant classification system.
